Comment on attachment 255731
v0 (apply via `git am`)

(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #1)

Actually I was pretty sure it will be ok since upstream has FreeBSD CI configured, but there was also need for some motivation to work on this ASAP due to personal reasons.

Now, as all poudriere queues are completed, I can confirm that 2.7.4 builds/installs fine on all supported releases and additionally also works fine on 14.2. (logs can be attached upon request.)
